meta-description: Learn about plan years by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Plan year
excerpt: A 12-month period of benefits coverage under a group health plan. This 12-month period may not be the same as the calendar year. To find out when your plan year begins, you can check your plan documents or ask your employer. (Note: For individual health insurance policies this 12-month period is called a “policy year”).
